query: The plan and task list are done — start implementing the tasks one at a time, tests first.
Run the implementer then the spec and quality reviewer subagents over each task in tasks.md
Build out the task list from the design doc using red-green-refactor
Time to write the code for the planned tasks and TDD each one in this worktree
Work through tasks.md subagent by subagent until every task is committed and reviewed

Type-check, lint, and run the full test suite before I open the PR
Push the validated branch and open the pull request
The PR has open review threads from the bots — fix each finding, reply, and mark them resolved.
Grab the next ready issue and drive it all the way to a merged PR
